zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Andrews II於1468年3月30日出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓時，他的父親Thomas Andrews31歲，母親Joan Margery Clarell22歲。他於1480年與Emma Knightley在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1530年7月5日在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈爾斯同享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Andrews II于1468年3月30日出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓时，他的父亲Thomas Andrews31岁，母亲Joan Margery Clarell22岁。他于1480年与Emma Knightley在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1530年7月5日在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈爾斯同享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Andrews II was born on 30 March 1468, in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Andrews, was 31 and his mother, Joan Margery Clarell, was 22. He married Emma Knightley in 1480, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 5 July 1530, in Harlestone, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Andrews II est né le 30 mars 1468, à Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Andrews, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Margery Clarell, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Emma Knightley en 1480, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 juillet 1530, à Harlestone, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Andrews II am 30. März 1468 in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Andrews 31 und seine Mutter Joan Margery Clarell 22. Er hat 1480 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Emma Knightley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Juli 1530 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Harlestone, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Andrews II è nato il il 30 marzo 1468 nel Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Andrews, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Margery Clarell, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Emma Knightley nel 1480, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 luglio 1530, nel Harlestone, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Andrews IIが1468年3月30日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチャーウエルトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Andrewsは31歳，母Joan Margery Clarellは22歳であった。1480年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでEmma Knightleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1530年7月5日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーレストーンで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチャーウエルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Andrews II(이)가 1468년 3월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 처웰턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Andrews(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Margery Clarell(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Emma Knightley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1530년 7월 5일 영국 노르섬프토실르 하를레스톤에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 처웰턴에 묻혔다.

pt.30 March 1468–5 July 1530: 30 de março de 1468–5 de julho de 1530
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Andrews II nasceu em 30 de março de 1468, em Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Andrews, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Margery Clarell, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma Knightley em 1480, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de julho de 1530, em Harlestone, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Andrews II родился 30 марта 1468 г. в местности чарвелтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Andrews было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Margery Clarell, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Knightley в 1480 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 5 июля 1530 г. в местности харльстоун, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности чарвелтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Emma Knightley en 1480, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de julio de 1530, en Harlestone, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
